hero.headline: Run your entire darts league from one place.
hero.subheadline: Pikado is the all-in-one platform for managing leagues, tournaments, and players.

whatIsPikado.headline: What is Pikado?
whatIsPikado.description: A complete SaaS platform built for darts clubs. Manage leagues, tournaments, and players all in one place. Track matches in real-time. Display results on club screens. Organize your entire season.

benefits.title: Real-time
benefits.description: Live match tracking and instant score updates.

benefits.title: Club screens
benefits.description: Display results on TVs and public pages.

features.headline: Everything Your Club Needs
features.subheadline: Purpose-built tools for managing darts leagues at any scale.

items.title: League Management
items.description: Create leagues with automatic scheduling. Round-robin format, circle method, dynamic sessions.

items.title: Player Tracking
items.description: Manage players, track statistics, match history, and opponents.

items.title: Tournament System
items.description: Single-elimination brackets. Real-time match tracking. Live updates.

items.title: Public Screens & QR
items.description: Display live results on club TVs. Share with QR code. Public pages for spectators.

items.title: Real-time Updates
items.description: WebSocket-powered live match tracking. Instant score updates across all views.

items.title: PDF Export
items.description: Export tables, schedules, and brackets as PDF.

howItWorks.headline: Up and Running in Minutes
howItWorks.subheadline: No training required. No complex setup. Just start managing your league.

steps.title: Create Your Club
steps.description: Set up your club in seconds.

steps.title: Create a League or Tournament
steps.description: Choose format, set rules, let Pikado generate the schedule.

steps.title: Track Matches Live
steps.description: Update scores in real-time. Display on screens. Archive results.

systemOverview.headline: Built for Professional Club Management
systemOverview.subheadline: Pikado handles the complexity so clubs can focus on the game.

benefits.title: Eliminates Chaos
benefits.description: No more spreadsheets. No more manual scheduling. Everything is organized.

benefits.title: Saves Time
benefits.description: Automate league scheduling, scoring, and result publication.

benefits.title: Professionalizes Your Club
benefits.description: Modern tools that make your club look serious.

realTimeDemo.headline: Watch Matches Come Alive
realTimeDemo.description: Live match tracking with instant updates. Teams, players, and spectators see results the moment they happen.

features.title: Live Match Dashboard
features.description: Real-time score updates as matches progress

features.title: Club TV Display
features.description: Show live leaderboard on club screens

features.title: QR Code Access
features.description: Instant access to match results via QR

cards.title: Modern Interface
cards.description: Clean, intuitive design. No learning curve.

cards.title: Reliable
cards.description: Real-time updates. Always available. Built for scale.

cards.title: Flexible
cards.description: Works with your club's rules. Customizable for any league format.
